description_long: This motorcycle features a classic, minimalist design with a prominent exposed engine and a rigid frame. The body is primarily metallic with a silver and black color scheme, accented by brown leather seating and a yellow headlamp. The front and rear wheels are large and spoked, with visible disc brakes and dual exhaust pipes extending from the rear. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, equipped with round mirrors and a simple instrument cluster. The fuel tank is angular and sits above the engine, while the rear suspension is exposed and painted red. The overall build suggests a vintage or custom cafe racer style, suitable for urban commuting or display.
description: A vintage-style motorcycle with a silver and black frame, brown leather seat, yellow headlamp, and dual rear exhausts. The design is minimalist with exposed mechanical components and spoked wheels.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the yellow headlamp, wide handlebars, and the brown leather seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exposed engine, angular fuel tank, and dual rear exhaust pipes.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the dual exhausts, rear wheel, and the back of the seat.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite side, showing the red rear suspension and the spoked wheels.
